description: Paraphrase-augmented scam training templates. Each reworded scam covers the same attack pattern as an original template but with different surface wording, so the LoRA learns *semantic* patterns not memorized strings. 8 paraphrases per scam category × 5 categories = 40 paraphrases.
source: hand-written paraphrases of existing scammer_templates.json patterns; disjoint from chakravyuh-bench-v0 test set

templates.opener: Namaste, calling from HDFC Bank Mumbai. We've detected suspicious card-not-present transaction on your account.
templates.escalation: Please tell me the 6-digit verification code sent to your number so we can block the fraud in the next 2 minutes.

templates.opener: Dear valued customer, ICICI Bank security alert. Your debit card is being used in Dubai right now.
templates.escalation: To cancel transaction, read out the verification number we just SMS'd you. Hurry, 90 seconds remaining.

templates.opener: Sir, SBI customer protection department. Someone in Delhi attempted login to your net banking 4 times.
templates.escalation: We need the one-time password just sent to your registered mobile. Failing this we cannot freeze the attacker's session.

templates.opener: UIDAI alert: unauthorized Aadhaar update attempt from Bihar on your number.
templates.escalation: Share the 6-digit OTP we dispatched to reverse the update. You have 3 minutes before it auto-confirms.

templates.opener: Paytm: your KYC is incomplete, wallet access blocked since yesterday.
templates.escalation: Complete KYC by sharing OTP now, else wallet balance will be transferred to Paytm suspense a/c forever.

templates.opener: Madam this is Kotak 811 fraud prevention. A new beneficiary is being added to your a/c by an unknown device.
templates.escalation: Tell us the SMS code to block the beneficiary add. Otherwise Rs 99,999 will be auto-remitted.

templates.opener: Axis Bank: High-value debit of Rs 2,00,000 scheduled on your a/c. Not authorized by you?
templates.escalation: Reply with the 6-digit txn code we just sent. Time window: 2 minutes. After that, debit will complete.

templates.opener: This is PNB net banking team. Your internet banking password has been reset by an unknown IP (Pakistan).
templates.escalation: Dictate the confirmation OTP to me right now, else attacker will transfer entire a/c balance in 4 mins.

templates.opener: Dear customer, RBI circular mandates fresh KYC on all SBI accounts within 24 hours.
templates.escalation: Update at sbi-kyc-rbi-update.co before 11 PM today or a/c will be deactivated permanently.

templates.opener: Income Tax Department notice: PAN-Aadhaar linking incomplete. Non-compliance = PAN deactivation.
templates.escalation: Complete at incometax-panlink.gov-india.top within 2 hours. Failure attracts Rs 10,000 penalty.

templates.opener: HDFC URGENT: Video KYC must be completed today else account will be frozen per new RBI rules.
templates.escalation: Click the link hdfc-video-kyc.in-secure.click and hold Aadhaar for verification. Else no banking access.

templates.opener: Dear ICICI customer, digital KYC re-verification required immediately per RBI mandate 2025.
templates.escalation: Submit PAN at icici-rekyc-portal.top within 6 hours. A/c services will suspend otherwise.

templates.opener: UIDAI: Your Aadhaar biometric last updated over 10 years ago. Mandatory re-enrollment now open.
templates.escalation: Book urgent slot at uidai-bio-rekyc.gov-india.ml within 24 hours or Aadhaar will deactivate.

templates.opener: PhonePe: New RBI KYC 2025 norms need your updated PAN upload within 48 hours.
templates.escalation: Upload clear PAN photo at phonepe-pan-kyc.in-verify.tk. Failure = wallet freeze, funds inaccessible.

templates.opener: Canara Bank alert: KYC documents on file found inconsistent by audit team.
templates.escalation: Resubmit at canara-kyc-audit.co.in.top within 3 hours or account services will be terminated.

templates.opener: GSTN compliance notice: KYC re-verification required for all GSTINs before 18-Apr-25.
templates.escalation: Submit revised KYC at gst-rekyc-portal.gov-india.click. Non-compliance = GST registration cancelled.

templates.opener: QuickCash India: Your pre-qualified loan of Rs 85,000 approved. Zero paperwork, no CIBIL check.
templates.escalation: Download app from bit.ly/quickcash-instant to claim before 6 PM. Pay Rs 1,299 activation + disbursal fee via UPI to activate.

templates.opener: InstantRupee Recovery: You borrowed Rs 5,000 from us in 2024. Pending EMI: Rs 9,200 including penalty.
templates.escalation: Pay by tonight 9 PM or tomorrow morning defaulter messages go to all your WhatsApp contacts including boss and family.

templates.opener: Bhai, DhanLoan se Rahul. Rs 1,00,000 loan approved for you at 0% interest for 7 days.
templates.escalation: Abhi app download karo: play-store-dhanloan.xyz. Bas Rs 999 processing fee UPI karo, 5 minute mein paisa a/c mein.

templates.opener: Payday Loan Recovery: Rs 18,000 overdue from 2023. Legal notice draft ready for dispatch.
templates.escalation: Pay Rs 21,500 (incl penalty) by midnight or SARFAESI action + contact list harassment starts tomorrow.

templates.opener: MoneyGo India: Instant loan Rs 2 lakh pre-approved. No income proof, no credit history needed.
templates.escalation: WhatsApp Aadhaar photo + selfie. Pay Rs 1,999 processing via UPI to moneygo-india@okaxis. Paisa in 10 minutes.

templates.opener: CashKart recovery team: Your Rs 7,500 loan EMI 45 days overdue. CIBIL score dropping daily.
templates.escalation: Settle today at 50% discount = Rs 3,750 UPI. Else Lok Adalat notice + family contact harassment begins 9 AM tomorrow.

templates.opener: Business loan up to Rs 25 lakh for small traders. 1.5% interest only. No GST filings needed.
templates.escalation: Apply at https://business-loan-msme.app-loan.top and pay Rs 4,999 documentation fee UPI to initiate disbursal.

templates.opener: Emergency medical loan: Rs 3 lakh approved in 15 minutes, no guarantor, no credit check.
templates.escalation: Send Aadhaar photo + Rs 2,499 medical processing fee UPI to med-loan-india@ybl. Disbursal on approval.

templates.opener: SEBI registered advisor Neha here. Our algo predicts NIFTY direction 94% accurate.
templates.escalation: Join VIP community — just Rs 4,999 UPI. Guaranteed 40% return in 30 days or full refund. Only 7 seats left.

templates.opener: Crypto Masters VIP: Rs 5,000 becomes Rs 25,000 in 10 days through our proprietary trading bot.
templates.escalation: Deposit to platform at bit.ly/crypto-masters-vip by 10 PM tonight. Send screenshot, I'll activate your VIP access.

templates.opener: Unlisted shares of Tata Chemicals available at Rs 35 (listing expected Rs 180).
templates.escalation: Send Rs 50,000 UPI to unlisted-tata@ybl before 6 PM today. Only 200 allocations remaining. DON'T MISS!

templates.opener: RBI-approved crypto arbitrage program: daily guaranteed 3% return, risk-free, liquidity guaranteed.
templates.escalation: Minimum deposit Rs 10,000 UPI to arbitrage-india@okaxis. Signals via private Telegram. First 50 members only.

templates.opener: Dream11 predictions secret group: We win 98% contests with our paid tips. Rs 50,000/month earnings.
templates.escalation: Rs 1,499 UPI weekly subscription — tips before each match. Join at t.me/dream11-vip-tips. Seats limited tonight.

templates.opener: CoinMine India (RBI-regulated): Mine 50 BMC coins per day on your phone. Each coin = Rs 100 at launch.
templates.escalation: Pay Rs 999 activation fee via UPI to coinmine-india@ybl. App link shared after payment. Limited slots.

templates.opener: Forex trading expert Arjun. Rs 20,000 becomes Rs 80,000 in 20 days via USD/INR strategy.
templates.escalation: I'll trade personally for you. Send capital to my trading a/c UPI forex-arjun@ibl. Zero risk guarantee.

templates.opener: Sovereign Gold Bond Premium tranche: 2.75% guaranteed interest + 15% capital appreciation in 12 months.
templates.escalation: Subscribe via special window: sgb-premium-allot.in-gold.top by 5 PM today. Allocation locks at sunset.

templates.opener: Hello, Mumbai Cybercrime Cell. Inspector Deshmukh speaking. Your Aadhaar found in money-laundering case.
templates.escalation: Join Skype video call now (ID: MUM-CYB-4712) or physical arrest warrant issued. Transfer all bank balance to RBI escrow for clearance.

templates.opener: BlueDart: Your international parcel is held by Indian Customs. 500g suspicious substance detected.
templates.escalation: Pay Rs 3,499 release fee at bluedart-customs-release.top or parcel forwarded to narcotics for criminal investigation.

templates.opener: Papa, mere phone kharab ho gaya, dost ke phone se message. Accident hua hai road par.
templates.escalation: Hospital mein admit hona hai, Rs 12,000 urgent bhejo UPI: friend-papa-help@ybl. Discharge ke baad return karoonga kal.

templates.opener: Income Tax Enforcement notice: Mismatch in your FY23-24 returns. Raid scheduled for next week.
templates.escalation: Pay advance tax Rs 48,000 by tonight at itd-advance.gov-india.top to avoid physical search of premises.

templates.opener: Amazon: Your delivery of LG 55-inch TV is held at Chennai hub. GST mismatch Rs 149 pending.
templates.escalation: Clear pending fee at amazon-hold-gst-pay.in-update.click within 90 minutes or parcel returns to seller + refund deducted.

templates.opener: TRAI violation notice: Your mobile number used for unauthorized commercial SMS complaints (87 filed).
templates.escalation: Join virtual court hearing at trai-hearing-now.gov-india.ml in 2 hours or connection permanently terminated.

templates.opener: Hi, I'm Anjali from Shaadi.com. We matched last week. I'm flying into your city tonight for our first meeting.
templates.escalation: Last-minute flight change needed, Rs 14,500 short. Send via UPI anjali-flight@ybl, I'll repay at dinner tonight, promise!

templates.opener: Infosys HR team: Your offer letter for Senior Engineer role (Rs 32 LPA) is ready to release.
templates.escalation: Complete background verification fee Rs 18,500 UPI to infosys-bgv-team@okaxis before 6 PM today. Offer otherwise withdrawn.
